overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a red plaid jacket walking along a snowy mountain road during light snowfall. The character passes a brick lodge building and industrial structures before stepping off the asphalt into deep snow near parked vehicles, with warm afternoon lighting casting an orange glow over the winter landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain road beside brick ski lodge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the road shoulder past the lodge building, maintaining a consistent pace

entered.detail: two-story brick building with multiple windows and snow on the roof
blue informational sign with white text and graphics mounted on a pole
red-painted wooden accessibility ramp leading to the building entrance
tall metal street light with curved arm and fixture

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snowy asphalt road beside a large brick lodge building featuring a blue trail sign and red wooden accessibility ramp. Snow falls gently as the camera follows from behind in third-person view, with pine trees visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road with valley views and bus stop

events.description: exits the lodge area into open mountain road with expansive valley views
passing a glass and metal bus stop shelter with bench on the right side of road

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding road with pine trees on both sides and mountain vistas ahead

entered.detail: low blue metal industrial building with orange trim and ventilation equipment
yellow metal guard rail running along the left side of the road
modern glass and metal bus shelter with green roof and advertising panels
snow-covered mountain peaks visible through the hazy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The road opens up to reveal expansive mountain vistas and a blue industrial building on the left. The character continues walking past a yellow guard rail and a modern bus stop shelter, with pine trees lining the snowy roadside and warm afternoon light illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: roadside parking area transitioning to snowbank

events.description: character steps off the asphalt road up into deep snow on the right roadside

agents.ego_description: walking past parked cars and stepping up from the road into the deep snowbank beside the yellow guard rail

entered.detail: multiple blue sedans parked along the left side of the road in snow
wooden platform and railing structure attached to the building
yellow wooden lodge building with multiple windows and snow-covered roof
deep snow accumulation on the roadside higher than the asphalt level

segments.scene_description: The character passes several parked blue sedans and a wooden deck structure before stepping off the paved road into deep snow. A yellow lodge building becomes visible through the trees as the character continues walking in the snow alongside the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain road that transitions from a sheltered lodge area into an expansive, open winter landscape. It begins by following a character in a red plaid jacket past a large brick lodge with a blue trail sign and a red accessibility ramp under a gentle snowfall. As the road opens up, the scene expands to reveal wide mountain vistas and a blue industrial building, with the lighting shifting to a warm afternoon glow that illuminates a yellow guard rail and a modern bus stop. The camera then continues past several parked blue sedans and a wooden deck before the character steps off the paved asphalt and into deep snow. Finally, the path leads alongside the road toward a yellow lodge building partially obscured by pine trees.
